rationale: Keep: the cited 2007 JMR paper is highly proximate in mechanism and setting (wireless plans, nonlinear/increasing-block tariffs, joint plan choice and usage uncertainty with hierarchical Bayesian estimation), which the 2008 citing paper also centers on for multipart pricing. Given this overlap and the citing paper’s stated extension of prior work on endogenous usage under complex tariffs, this reference is plausibly methodological/foundational rather than an incidental mention.
